name: AWS KMSKeys Exposed Through Vulnerable VMs
query: vms( where: { securityGroups_SOME: { rules_SOME: { direction: { eq: "Inbound" } action: { eq: "Allow" } AND: [ { OR: [ { sources_INCLUDES: "cidr:0.0.0.0/0" } { sources_INCLUDES: "cidr:::/0" } ] } { destFromPort_LTE: 22, destToPort_GTE: 22 } ] } } iamRoles_SOME: { iamPolicies_SOME: { iamPolicyStatements_SOME: { effect: { eq: "Allow" } } } } } ) { iamRoles { iamPolicies { iamPolicyStatements { permissions { isOwnedByIAMAssetType { includesKMSKey {...AssetFragment} } } } } } }
